subcodes.first_line: I bear witness, O my God and God of all things, my Creator and Creator of the heavens, my Fashioner and Fashioner of the Kingdom of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اشهد یا الهی و اله الاشیاء و فاطری و فاطر السماء و خالقی و خالق ملکوت الاسماء
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @martyrs and martyrdom
